'''dhabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ironhandedly|ironhandedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ironhandedly|ironhandedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhabate|dhabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhabatesher|dhabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhabatesherĂ«m|dhabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhabatero|dhabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhabateshĂ«|dhabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhabateshĂ«m|dhabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhabatero|gokidhabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhabateshĂ«|gokidhabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhabateshĂ«m|gokidhabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhabankerom|godhabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhabankeshĂ«|godhabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhabankeshĂ«m|godhabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhabankeya|godhabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhabaterom|dhabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhabatemu|dhabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhabateya|dhabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhabaterom|gokidhabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhabatemu|gokidhabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhabateya|gokidhabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhababate|dhababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhababatesher|dhababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhababatesherĂ«m|dhababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhababatero|dhababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhababateshĂ«|dhababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhababateshĂ«m|dhababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhababatero|gokidhababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhababateshĂ«|gokidhababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhababateshĂ«m|gokidhababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhababankerom|godhababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhababankeshĂ«|godhababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhababankeshĂ«m|godhababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhababankeya|godhababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhababaterom|dhababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhababatemu|dhababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhababateya|dhababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhababaterom|gokidhababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhababatemu|gokidhababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhababateya|gokidhababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠte|dhĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠtesher|dhĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠtero|dhĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠbĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠbĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠbĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠterom|dhĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠtemu|dhĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠbĂŠteya|dhĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠbĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠbĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafbafte|dhafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafbaftesher|dhafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafbaftesherĂ«m|dhafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafbaftero|dhafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafbafteshĂ«|dhafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafbafteshĂ«m|dhafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafbaftero|gokidhafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafbafteshĂ«|gokidhafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafbafteshĂ«m|gokidhafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafbafnkerom|godhafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafbafnkeshĂ«|godhafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafbafnkeshĂ«m|godhafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafbafnkeya|godhafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafbafterom|dhafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafbaftemu|dhafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafbafteya|dhafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafbafterom|gokidhafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafbaftemu|gokidhafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafbafteya|gokidhafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
